name: Baked Hush Puppies 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Make a well in the center and set aside.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients.
4. Add the wet mixture to the dry mixture and stir until just moistened.
5. Grease miniature muffin tins with cooking spray.
6. Spoon 1 tablespoon batter into each cup.
7. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes.
8. Remove from pans and serve immediately.
Yield: 3 dozen
